zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Montfort於大約1286年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert11284歲，母親Alicia Plaunche21歲。她於1311年5月31日之前與Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1330年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾卡素 利波迪享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Montfort于大约1286年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert11284岁，母亲Alicia Plaunche21岁。她于1311年5月31日之前与Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1330年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾卡素 利波迪享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Montfort was born about 1286, in England, United Kingdom, her father, John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert, was 11284 and her mother, Alicia Plaunche, was 21. She married Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville before 31 May 1311, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1330, in Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Montfort est née environ 1286, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert, avait 11284 ans et sa mère, Alicia Plaunche, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville avant 31 mai 1311, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1330, à Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Montfortが約1286年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesertは11284歳，母Alicia Plauncheは21歳であった。1311年5月31日以前にイギリスイギリスでSir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Frevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1330年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアカストル リバートイで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Montfort(이)가 대략 1286년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert(은)는 11284세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alicia Plaunche(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1311년 5월 31일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 카스틀 리버티에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville antes 31 de maio de 1311, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Montfort родилась около 1286 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert было 11284 года, а матери, которую звали Alicia Plaunche, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville перед 31 май 1311 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1330 г. в местности кастл либирти, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
